privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for calligra_words_env bibliography_formatting task. Verified that the data is synthetically generated via setup_task.sh, which dynamically builds an ODT file using the 'odfpy' library. Confirmed target file paths, journal keywords for italicization checks, and document body strings directly match descriptions and scoring constraints. Discovered a major bug: expected_authors_order claims the 15th element is 'World', but splitting the reference on ',' yields 'World Health Organization. (2019). Ten threats to global health in 2019. WHO.'. Since the verifier checks for exact equality (case-insensitive), it will fail to score the 15th element correctly.
